manageSubscriptionPlatformIOSError: You subscribed via Apple on iOS. To change or cancel this subscription (upgrade/downgrade), please use your Apple device—or visit the App Store settings or the Apple website.
manageSubscriptionPlatformAndroidError: You subscribed via Google Play on Android. To change or cancel this subscription (upgrade/downgrade), please use Google Play subscriptions—tap the button below or visit your Play Store account.

subscriptionSuccessMessage: Subscription successful! We’re excited to have you on board. Enjoy your access!
